title: Saros Worldborder Customizer
description: Fully customize your world border with RGB colors, opacity settings, and animated pulse effects. Works instantly in multiplayer and saves all settings automatically.
body:
![header](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Saros_Worldborder_Customizer/BH_Saros_Worldborder_Customizer_header.webp)

**Saros Worldborder Customizer** gives server admins and singleplayer users full control over the look of the Minecraft world border. Change its color, make it invisible, adjust transparency, set a custom warning color, or let it pulse with animated flair — all in real time, synced instantly to every connected player, and saved across server restarts.

![features](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Saros_Worldborder_Customizer/BH_Saros_Worldborder_Customizer_features.webp)

- **Custom Border Color** 🎨
  - Set any color using RGB values (0–255 per channel).
  - `/saros_worldborder color <r> <g> <b>`
  - Example: `/saros_worldborder color 255 128 0` → orange border.

- **Hide / Show** 👻
  - Make the world border completely invisible with a single command.
  - `/saros_worldborder hide` — border disappears entirely.
  - `/saros_worldborder show` — border becomes visible again.

- **Opacity Control** 🔆
  - Adjust the transparency of the border independently of its color.
  - `/saros_worldborder opacity <0-255>` — 0 = fully transparent, 255 = fully opaque.

- **Warning Color** ⚠️
  - Define a separate color that activates automatically when a player steps inside the border's warning distance.
  - `/saros_worldborder warningcolor <r> <g> <b>`
  - Works alongside Minecraft's built-in warning distance setting.

- **Pulse Animation** 💫
  - Animate the border so it smoothly pulses between the main color and a secondary color.
  - `/saros_worldborder pulse <r> <g> <b> <speed 1-10>` — speed 1 is slow, 10 is fast.
  - `/saros_worldborder pulse off` — disables the animation.

- **Instant Multiplayer Sync** 🌐
  - Every change is broadcast to all online players the moment the command is executed.
  - Newly joining players automatically receive the current state.

- **Persistent Storage** 🔄
  - All settings are saved to the world folder (`wbcustomizer_state.json`) and restored after every server restart.
  - Per-world: different worlds can have different border configurations.

- **Permission System** 🔒
  - On multiplayer servers: OP level 2 required.
  - In singleplayer: all commands are available by default.

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/7KwNVoifEaQ" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

![commands](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Saros_Worldborder_Customizer/BH_Saros_Worldborder_Customizer_commands.webp)

| Command | Description |
|---|---|
| `/saros_worldborder` | Show all available commands (EN + DE) |
| `/saros_worldborder color <r> <g> <b>` | Set border color (RGB 0–255 each) |
| `/saros_worldborder opacity <0-255>` | Set border transparency |
| `/saros_worldborder warningcolor <r> <g> <b>` | Set color shown near border edge |
| `/saros_worldborder pulse <r> <g> <b> <speed>` | Enable pulsing animation (speed 1–10) |
| `/saros_worldborder pulse off` | Disable pulsing animation |
| `/saros_worldborder hide` | Make border completely invisible |
| `/saros_worldborder show` | Restore border visibility |
| `/saros_worldborder reset` | Reset everything to default blue |

![support](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Saros_Worldborder_Customizer/BH_Saros_Worldborder_Customizer_versions.webp)

### Currently Supported ✅
- **Forge 1.20.1**
- **Fabric 1.20.1**
- **Forge 1.21.1**
- **NeoForge 1.21.1**
- **Fabric 1.21.1**
- **Forge 26.1**
- **NeoForge 26.1**
- **Fabric 26.1**
- **Forge 26.1.2**
- **NeoForge 26.1.2**
- **Fabric 26.1.2**

![join](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Saros_Worldborder_Customizer/BH_Saros_Worldborder_Customizer_discord.webp)

For requests, suggestions, or bug reports, join the [Discord](https://discord.gg/H8a8CJe) and become part of the Saro's Mod community!
